---
title: "decision-log"
format: html
---

## Assignment a08 decision log entry
# st_within vs st_intersects 
st_within checks whether one object is "within" the other one completely. st_intersects checks whether the objects have any intersections; in other words, it checks if one object has anything within the other, but not completely. 

# did ggspatial basemap add value? 
I don't believe the ggspatial basemap added any value because it showed us data that we already created using other methods. I feel like it would be more valuable if it helped us visualize the data in a different way but I don't believe that it did.
